warnings: This is a small inset detail on the same sheet as the main floor plumbing plan (see sibling file); pipe callouts (diameters/symbols) are legible but the precise fixture-to-fixture pipe topology is hard to trace with certainty at this image resolution.
Labeled as 'ท่อประปาเดินใต้พื้น' (water supply piping routed under the floor slab) in the drawing subtitle.
grid_ref is free-text descriptive positioning only, not formal structural grid notation.
